text:
(In reply to Kyle Evans from comment #3)

Ahhh, of course!

I thought there must be a reason why they didn't use getopt in the first place!

I haven't had time to look at it yet, but I'm still up for fixing it (one way or the other)

I'll put a review up. Can I add you to the review list? (I'm not sure the etiquette for adding people to reviews)

cheers, J
